summary: BLOCK 515 & 517 - Golden Hive Badge Restack and Tooltip feature fully verified. Badge successfully moved to right action column with correct styling, visible to ALL users, and tooltip working with proper dark theme.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 515: Badge correctly positioned in right action column (ProfilePage.js lines 657-684) - x=1187px verified, well separated from left bio area (x=489px)
BLOCK 515: Text color correctly set to #2C2C2C (rgb(44,44,44)) - deep charcoal for accessibility
BLOCK 515: Font weight correctly set to bold (700)
BLOCK 515: Shield SVG has stroke='#8B6914' for darker gold outline
BLOCK 515: Badge visible to ALL viewers (tested with admin viewing testuser1's profile)
BLOCK 515: No duplicate badge in left bio section - old location properly removed
BLOCK 517: TooltipProvider with delayDuration=200 correctly implemented
BLOCK 517: Tooltip has dark charcoal background #1A1A1A (rgb(26,26,26))
BLOCK 517: Tooltip has white text color (rgb(255,255,255))
BLOCK 517: Tooltip headline 'Golden Hive ID' and trust message text verified
BLOCK 515: golden-shimmer CSS class present for animation effect
seed_data_creation: None - used existing testuser1 with golden_hive_verified=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKS 515 & 517 verified. Golden Hive badge is in the right action column (x=1187) below Stripe Connected button. testuser1 has golden_hive_verified=true and badge appears for both own profile view and when other users view. Tooltip has dark charcoal #1A1A1A background, white text, 8px border-radius with 200ms delay. Shield SVG has stroke #8B6914. No duplicate badge exists in the old left bio location.
